title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・らしくない

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I did my best, I couldn't become
queen... But I won't abandon my path to
becoming a princess!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, I overhear some negative comments
coming from the spectators. They say I lost
because I'm not fit to be queen...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Were people really hurt because of my wild
behavior?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
What's more, it turns out that what Trainer was
hiding from me before wasn't a present at all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I guess Trainer was trying to keep me from seeing
all these negative letters... Am I a princess that
nobody wants?
